news.t: Need Income? American Century Debuts Securitized Credit ETF

overview.description: The American Century Securitized Credit ETF (ASEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks a high level of current income and total return through exposure to USD-denominated, investment-grade securitized credit. The portfolio duration is less than five years ASEC was launched on May 27, 2026 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Need Income? American Century Debuts Securitized Credit ETF
data.text: The ETF ecosystem grows day by day, spiking in recent years with serious inflows and many new active ETF launches. American Century Investments has added to the active ETF pool with its latest launch ...
